461 RPT_CRCT_YR_DSCHRG_CD RPT_CRCT_YR_DSCHRG_CD BIMS - Temporal Orientation - Year (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was able to identify the current year. 3 = Correct 
2 = Missed by 1 year 
1 = Missed by 2-5 years 
0 = Missed by > 5 years or no answer 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank
462 RPT_CRCT_MO_DSCHRG_CD RPT_CRCT_MO_DSCHRG_CD BIMS - Temporal Orientation - Month (Dsch)
